calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:33 am and concluding at 9:49 am.

Plaintiff Pillar Industries Inc., is represented by Charles Farano, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Subpac Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

ANDY CHU is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

COURT FINDS:
1. The complaint filed June 10, 2024 is the operative pleading.
2. The complaint was served upon the Defendant by personal service on June 13, 2024.
3. Default against Defendant Subpac Inc. entered on August 09, 2024.
4. The DOES in this matter were dismissed on September 14, 2024.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Pillar Industries Inc., and against Defendant Subpac Inc., A Delaware Corporation, as follows:

Damages: $28,683.20

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $28,683.20

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2024 Continued To Feb-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Continued To Jan-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2024 Continued To Jan-08-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
